allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], f['download_url']\) for f in data if isinstance\(data, list\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], f.get\('download_url',''\), f['type']\) for f in data if isinstance\(data, list\)]")
